name: Chili Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 42 oz Tofu, firm, frozen and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Squeeze excess water from thawed tofu and tear into pieces. Mix marinade ingredients and pour over tofu, mixing well. Cook in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until slightly browned, stirring constantly. Set aside.
3. To make the enchilada sauce, sauté onion and garlic in a small amount of water until translucent. Add remaining ingredients and simmer over low heat for 30 minutes. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water and gradually add to the sauce while stirring. Cook until boiling and thickened.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Pour about 1 cup enchilada sauce into the bottom of a 15" X 10" baking dish or two smaller dishes. Place 1/3 cup tofu mixture down the center of each tortilla, roll up, and place in the dish.
6. Repeat until all burritos are filled and rolled. Pour remaining enchilada sauce over filled burritos and bake for 30 minutes.
Variation: For added richness, sprinkle grated soy cheese and sliced olives before baking.
